handshake {"server_version":200,"connection_time":"20260405 12:00:00 CET"}
server managed_accounts {"accounts":["DU12345"]}
server next_valid_id {"order_id":1001}
client req_mkt_depth_exchanges {}
server mkt_depth_exchanges {"exchanges":[{"exchange":"ARCA","sec_type":"STK","listing_exch":"ARCA","service_data_type":"Deep","agg_group":4}]}
disconnect
